13.9 Photorespiration
122. Read the following statements-
Statement A — Ribulose Bisphosphate is
the most abundant enzyme in the world.
Statement B — Photorespiration doesn't
occur in Cs plants.
Choose the correct option- (Pg. 220, E)
A) Ais correct and B is incorrect
B) Bis correct and A is incorrect
C) A and B are correct
D) A and B are incorrect
123. RUBisCO has when CO2 & Oz is
equal. (Pg. 220, E)
A) greater affinity for CO than O»
B) greater affinity for O» than CO»
C) equal affinity for CO & Oz
D) no affinity for O»
124. In Cs plants- (Pg. 220, E)
